![][image1]  
**Hero Features (stacking)**

* **Anti-Slice Speed Geometry Design**: shape (*speed and slice assisting*), material (3-piece/titanium: titanium face is thinner walls to provide *more ball speed*), size (445cc) \= 445cc less bulky so *easier to get the face square & less spin* (compared to 460cc)  
* **Aero Square Crown Channels**: (1) channels allow air to *help close the face around the shaft*; (2) *visual guide*  
* **Speed Geometry Toe Slot**: Reduced material in toe to *help get the club around/square*


**Secondary Features**

* **Counter-Slice Keel**: Weight structure low and toward the heel so it *helps turn the face square at impact* \= dynamic face closure (can easily be seen on club)  
* **Draw Biased CG**: Center of gravity deep in heel *to help close the face*  
* **Draw Calibrated Face Angle**: Slightly closed *to get a head start to close at impact* BUT does not look closed at setup (visual of lines on top vs. face angle)  
* **Draw Spin Face Bulge**: *More draw spin* on **toe** (higher “gear effect”) but *less bulge for less spin on **heel** to reduce slice ←Can SEE this with the lines/design differences*

**Additional Features**

* **Square Launch Specs**:  
  * Material: Titanium *for speed*  
  * Length: On the shorter end of the driver length spectrum *to square the club easier*  
  * Loft: 12 degrees with 3 degrees closed (15 @ 0\) *for height/distance*  
  * Lie: Slightly more upright *for squaring*  
  * Other: head for *speed/square* & 3 degrees closed face *for squaring*  
* **Takeaway Tracks**: *Visual lines for alignment & takeaway guidance*  
* **Counterbalanced Shaft**: More weight in upper part of the shaft to feel less toward the head *for speed and closure* ←6 shaft type options so offering them for a broader audience (better players too)

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
